summary: Frontend testing of new Skill Tree feature (POE2-style SVG pan/zoom tree with 8 branches, 65 nodes), Meta Lock Gates, and Attribute system. Found and fixed a critical bug: node cost field mismatch (poe_tree.js uses 'c' but SkillTree.jsx referenced 'costPerLvl'), making all node purchases impossible. After fix, all 14 requested features verified working.

issues: Tree initially shows top nodes only; bottom start nodes are at bottom of viewport, may confuse users. Not a bug but a UX note.

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: poe_tree.js uses 'c' for node cost but SkillTree.jsx used 'costPerLvl' everywhere — this made ALL node purchases impossible (undefined cost). Fixed in SkillTree.jsx to use 'c' consistently.
seed_data_creation: Used localStorage wds.save.v1 with sp:30, profile.level:8, skills:{}, attrs:{}
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 14 skill tree features verified: (1) Skills btn opens tree ✅, (2) 8 branch labels visible at bottom ✅, (3) Pan works ✅, (4) Zoom works ✅, (5) Click node opens preview panel ✅, (6) Preview shows name/type/desc/level pips/SP cost/BUY btn ✅, (7) Locked nodes show disabled btn ✅, (8) Start nodes purchasable ✅, (9) Buying deducts SP and increments level ✅, (10) Next node unlocked after buying start node ✅, (11) META tab shows 7 locked items ✅, (12) ATTRIBUTES btn shows 7 attr panel ✅, (13) Attr allocation works (level 8 = 7 free points) ✅, (14) X closes overlay ✅. Key bug fixed: SkillTree.jsx now uses node.c (not node.costPerLvl).
rca_of_issue: BUG: poe_tree.js defines node cost as field 'c' (e.g. c:1), but SkillTree.jsx referenced 'node.costPerLvl' in 4 places (buyNode(), selCanBuy check, cost display, button text). Since costPerLvl was undefined: (a) save.sp >= undefined = false so selCanBuy was always false, (b) button showed 'UNLOCK TREE FIRST' for all unlocked nodes, (c) no node could be purchased. Fix: replaced all 4 occurrences of costPerLvl with c in SkillTree.jsx.
